Using the data in Table 6, explain why a greater reliance on indirect taxes compared to income taxes for revenue collection is often associated with a higher Gini coefficient value.

meta.title: Using the data in Table 6, explain why a greater reliance on indirect taxes compared to income taxes for revenue collection is often associated with a higher Gini coefficient value
